summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Shraddha Enterprises B2B e-commerce platform. All major features tested including home page, product catalog, admin portal, query system, and WhatsApp integration.
passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, features cards, featured products grid, testimonials
Products page shows 8 products with category filter sidebar, search functionality
Product detail page shows image gallery, specs table, colour variants, action buttons
Send Query modal opens, form submits successfully, success message displayed
WhatsApp button generates correct wa.me link with product name and phone 87766986473
Quote page loads and shows empty state correctly
Contact page form submission works with success feedback
Admin login successful with admin@shraddha.com / admin123
Admin dashboard shows stats (9 products, 5 categories), charts, recent queries
Admin products page shows product list with search, category filter, CRUD actions
Admin add product form loads with all required fields
Admin categories page shows categories with expand/collapse, subcategories management
Admin queries page shows query list with filters (all/unread/read), search, export CSV
Backend API testing: 26/26 tests passed (100% success rate)
Products CRUD operations working correctly
Categories CRUD operations working correctly
Queries and contact form API working correctly
Dashboard statistics and charts API working
Settings management API working
Testimonials API working
Admin authentication with httpOnly cookies working
Email notifications properly MOCKED as specified
